title: SΔϕ-39 — Hallucination as Weak World-Binding Overclaimed as Fact

core_claim: Hallucination is not merely false output. Hallucination occurs when a weakly world-bound construction, inference, or UMR-filled continuation is output as if it were strongly bound to observed world trace.

primary_formulae.trace_mislabel: Hallucination = Inference output as Observed Trace
primary_formulae.operational_refinement: Hallucination = model-world mismatch + insufficient world-binding + strong claim form
